category_sources: Official SourceForge project page describes net-tools as base networking utilities for Linux.
source_facts.description says Linux networking base tools.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project and README use net-tools.
docs_sources: Official net-tools project home summarizes commands and project purpose.
Official source tree README and man directory provide the best project documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge Code page for net-tools shows Git branches and HTTPS/git access.
source_facts.repo was empty, so official SourceForge Git repository URL was determined.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge README describes legacy tools for controlling the Linux kernel network subsystem.
source_facts.executables includes ifconfig, netstat, route, arp, hostname, and related networking tools.
